sagemaker.domain.AppNetworkAccessType.Docs: Specifies the VPC used for non-EFS traffic. The default value is `PublicInternetOnly`.  + `PublicInternetOnly` - Non-EFS traffic is through a VPC managed by Amazon SageMaker, which allows direct internet access+ `VpcOnly` - All Studio traffic is through the specified VPC and subnets

sagemaker.domain.AuthMode.Docs: The mode of authentication that members use to access the domain.

sagemaker.domain.KmsKeyId.Docs: SageMaker uses AWS KMS to encrypt the EFS volume attached to the domain with an AWS managed customer master key (CMK) by default. For more control, specify a customer managed CMK.

sagemaker.domain.SubnetIds.Docs: The VPC subnets that Studio uses for communication.
sagemaker.domain.SubnetIds.Array members: Minimum number of 1 item\. Maximum number of 16 items\.

sagemaker.domain.Tags.Docs: Tags to associated with the Domain. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. Tag keys must be unique per resource. Tags are searchable using the Search API.   Tags that you specify for the Domain are also added to all Apps that are launched in the Domain.
sagemaker.domain.Tags.Array members: Minimum number of 0 items\. Maximum number of 50 items\.

sagemaker.domain.VpcId.Docs: The ID of the Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) that Studio uses for communication.
